message:
feat(telemetry): Add fcp-telemetry crate for unified observability

Implements comprehensive observability library for FCP connectors:

- Structured logging with JSON output and sensitive data redaction
- Metrics collection with counters, gauges, histograms, and timers
- Pre-defined FCP metrics (requests, errors, health, rate limits, events)
- Distributed tracing with W3C Trace Context propagation
- Prometheus metrics export endpoint
- OTLP trace export to OpenTelemetry collectors
- Telemetry context for correlation ID propagation
- Health check response helpers

Dependencies: opentelemetry, metrics, metrics-exporter-prometheus

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-telemetry"
+description = "Unified metrics, logging, and tracing for FCP connectors"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core = { path = "../fcp-core" }
+
+# Tracing
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber = { workspace = true, features = ["json", "env-filter"] }
+
+# OpenTelemetry
+opentelemetry = "0.27"
+opentelemetry_sdk = { version = "0.27", features = ["rt-tokio"] }
+opentelemetry-otlp = { version = "0.27", features = ["tonic"] }
+
+# Metrics
+metrics = "0.24"
+metrics-exporter-prometheus = "0.16"
+
+# Async runtime
+tokio.workspace = true
+
+# Serialization
+serde.workspace = true
+serde_json.workspace = true
+
+# Time
+chrono.workspace = true
+
+# Error handling
+thiserror.workspace = true
+
+# Identifiers
+uuid.workspace = true
+
+# Utilities
+once_cell = "1.21"
+parking_lot = "0.12"
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"] }
